kept.text:
Markets don’t usually misprice strength for long.

$AMZN is showing a rare combination of accelerating AWS growth (28% YoY, fastest in 15 quarters), a massive $364B backlog, and $15B already coming from AI services, while advertising keeps compounding at 22% CAGR and margins quietly expand to record levels.

Yet at $272.95, the story still isn’t fully reflected in price.

When earnings power from AWS and AI starts to fully flow through, the gap between perception and reality narrows fast. That’s where repricing happens, not on headlines, but on delayed recognition.

Near-term fair range sits closer to $290–$300 if momentum holds.

Join @questflow and @QFCommunity today 

 Explore today: https://t.co/v84p62NVrd
